info.title: MBW.Tools.GhStandardContent
info.description:
Michael Bisbjerg 2026
-t, --gh-token
--branch-name       (Default: feature/auto-contents)
--commit-author     (Default: Auto Contents)
--commit-email      (Default: AutoContents@example.org)
--labels            Labels to add to the PR, example: feature,dependencies
--proxy
--meta-reference    Free-form reference string stored in
.standard_content.json meta.reference. Use empty to
remove.
--local-path        Apply standard content to a local repo checkout instead of
GitHub.
-r, --repo
--help              Display this help screen.
--version           Display version information.
value pos. 0        Required.

options.name: --labels
options.description: Labels to add to the PR, example: feature,dependencies

options.name: --meta-reference
options.description:
Free-form reference string stored in
.standard_content.json meta.reference. Use empty to
remove.

options.name: --local-path
options.description:
Apply standard content to a local repo checkout instead of
GitHub.
